description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a light beige and white exterior, featuring a combination of flat and gently sloped gable roofs. The front facade includes a driveway, a garage, and a main entrance flanked by landscaped greenery and a low white fence. Large windows dominate the side and rear elevations, providing ample natural light and views to the outside, while the rear features a spacious balcony or terrace with outdoor seating. The property is surrounded by dense hedges and mature trees, offering privacy and a lush, green environment. The house sits on a paved lot with clear access paths and a well-maintained garden. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern two-story house with beige and white walls, large windows, a gable roof, and lush landscaping, featuring a driveway, garage, and spacious rear terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with a low white fence.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the back garden, hedge boundary, and secondary entrances with less window exposure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large terrace or balcony, extensive windows, and dense greenery along the property line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional garden space, side access, and the continuation of the hedge and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, steps, and flanked by landscaping and a low white fence
